charter: Use AgentXchain roles to move tusq.dev forward. Preserve current operator-created work unless the agents explicitly decide it should change; prioritize concrete code, tests, fixtures, docs, or release-readiness outcomes.
acceptance_contract: Agent turn is assigned through AgentXchain
PM or dev provides a concrete next-step plan or patch
No unrelated workspace state is reverted
